transcript: Can't the future just wait? Can't the deadlines come fashionably late? I could push every goal back, take control back, if they'd roll back The rate at which time starts to fly, never landing or standing by Never taking a break, ever making me retry We nickel and dime every quarter to two But maybe it's time to let time pass through If the future is bright It doesn't shine with that end of the tunnel light. More like a deer in the headlights, sudden red lights, or your dead lights as the anglerfish bite. It's not fair. The past is clear, but it's clear back there. What's ahead, no one knows, But it's closing in, we swear Still not in my prime, I have so much to do But maybe it's time to let time pass through
